Item.name: Satchel Charge (C-4)
Item.description: Looks like a normal backpack, but is secretly packed with plastic explosive. Set the timer, arm, and RUN.

Item.name: Satchel Charge (IED)
Item.description: Looks like a normal backpack, but is secretly packed with plastic explosive. Set the timer, arm, and RUN.

Item.name: Satchel Charge (Nuclear)
Item.description: Looks like a normal backpack, but is secretly packed with a nuclear payload. Set the timer, arm, and run VERY far.

Item.name: Breaching Charge
Item.description: Designed for breach and clear operations. This charge will concuss anyone near the blast, so get back once you've armed it.

Item.name: EMP Charge
Item.description: Designed to shut down enemy ships from the outside. This charge will shock anyone near the blast, so get back once you've armed it.
